string 2: This place...
It looks like we've gone back in time again.

You're amazing, Aegiomon! With a power like that... everything's
gonna turn out okay.
And I'm sure anyone would say the same...
With the ability to manipulate time, anything is possible... right?
But I'm sure you of all people haven't forgotten...
About Dr. Yuki, ADAMAS founder and your adoptive father.

He got close to the truth behind the principles of time, and
ended up disappearing from this world...
...as if he crossed a line that shouldn't have been crossed.

If anything were possible, we'd be entering the forbidden
domain of the gods...

And that is a domain we cannot easily tread upon. We may upset
the very order of this world.

Those who bear such power pose an immense threat.
Watch over him with extreme caution.

If something doesn't change, are all these Digimon gonna
lose their lives...?

There's no way we can allow that! We have to find out
what's going to happen here!
Bacchusmon, something's wrong with everyone.
Bacchusmon...?
Oh, no. I can't wake him...
What's... going on...?
Inori!
Go to sleep... To sleep... Sleep...
Sleep... sleep...
Sleep... sleep...
That voice...
Whose... is it...?
You fell asleep, too?

I heard a strange song, and I just couldn't keep my eyes
open anymore.
When I came to, I found myself here.
Is there an exit anywhere?
Oh, my. What do we have here? You look like light sleepers.
Wait a moment... Are you by chance Aegiomon?
Do... you know me?

Of course I do. Your name has appeared in my dreams
countless times.

Hmph. "Great Guardian Aegiomon"! It is because of YOU that
our Lord Titamon—

Titamon... You mean the Digimon that fought me for the treasure 
in Shinjuku!
How dare you! Lord Titamon disappeared after fighting you!

I was so happy serving under Lord Titamon! And you,
"Great Guardian Aegiomon," took that away from me!
I will avenge Lord Titamon!
Don't you dare think that you won, here...
Aegiomon... You are no hero reborn.
We Titans see you as a demon incarnate.
A d-demon?!
Chronomon's curse weighs that heavily on the Titans...

That's why... I'm gonna haunt your dreams... Our grudge...
The Titans' grudge... Isn't going away so easily...
Ngh...
Lord Titamon...
I shall... go to you now...
Wha-What happened...?
I see... That is without a doubt the work of the Titans.

They've attacked the sanctuary many times before, but I drove
them away each time.

They probably figured out that they couldn't win with force,
so they resorted to trickery!
Sirenmon was right to warn us.
We really can't let our guard down.
I'm just glad you're safe. Is everything okay now?
No. Their true target is the sanctuary, or, rather, the Current.

I left Sirenmon in charge of guarding the sanctuary... I'd better
hurry back to help.
Will you accompany me there now?
Of course. I'll start the mission right away.{next}

The sanctuary is the source of the Current. We Titans have
long cherished the hope of taking it.

You've been blessed by the Current long enough, haven't you?
We'll be the ones celebrating tonight! Heh heh heh!
Ngh...!

Disrupting the flow of the sanctuary's Current, turning
this into a war of attrition—that was all according to plan.

But that drunkard's bizarre strength exceeded expectations,
and that pushed back our conquest of the sanctuary.
The boss is definitely not happy about that.

Can't make an omelet without breaking a few Digitamamon,
though, right? That's what this plan is all about.

Never thought it'd go this swimmingly. We should've just
done this from the start!
Ugh... If things keep going this way...
Raaaaagh!
Phew...
I really thought I was done for this time.

Do you have any idea how much singing I did trying to wake
you up?
Can I assume you're sober?
You bet! Leave things to me!
Attention, Titan scum! This is OUR party space!
And none of you are invited, so show yourselves out, now!
You were right. I shouldn't have let my guard down.
I'm sorry...

There's no need to apologize. I understood now how great
this responsibility has been.

I'm sorry... for letting you shoulder the burden of protecting
the sanctuary alone... all this time.

Everyone in the village was happy to entrust it all to you,
but the greater your responsibility, the more you drank...
It was totally unfair to you, and that's on me.

Even though I saw everything you were going through up
close—closer than anyone—I still let you struggle all alone.
That's... not entirely true.
I felt it, you know. I knew how sincerely thankful you were.
Did you think I didn't hear you?

I may have been drunk and half asleep, but I heard you,
always there, singing gently by my side...
...singing to heal my body and soul from the fatigue of battle...

So, I don't think of this responsibility as a burden, and I
don't feel alone.
Please, protect the Gear Forest.
And then we can throw a party and celebrate tonight once again!

I'll be sure to sing my best songs. You can't have a feast
without music, right?
Of course not. That goes without saying!

Take care of that singing voice of yours, because this is
going to be one long party!

I'm drinkin' until the sun comes up—right after I take out
these goons!
Hey-Hey! Are you all right?!
I was always waiting for you... to wake up...
...but it seems you woke up... just a little too late this time...
What do you—Wait! No!
I need... to rest now...
I might be late... to the party tonight...

...but I suppose you'll learn how it feels to wait for
someone for a change...
I'm so sorry... for everything...
I've been such an irresponsible leader...!
No... I... should be the one to apologize...
I'm sorry... for making you shoulder this burden... alone...
I told you it's not a burden...!

Everyone in the village is great, and I've always been so
happy to get to celebrate with them!

All I've ever wanted is to protect this
place that I cherish so much.
It's the same with your singing. I could listen to it for an eternity.
All right.
I'll be sure to let you hear me sing again... one day...
But... right now... it's your turn...
...to wait for me...
What are these...?
Did Sirenmon die?{next}
Did Sirenmon return to the earth?{next}
Sirenmon is gonna be fine...
Just needs to rest for a little while to heal some wounds...
And after all the sleeping I've done after a night of drinking...

...who am I to complain, right? I'm more grateful than
anything else...
Thank you. I'll be waiting, no matter how long it takes.
I'll keep our party space safe, no matter what.
So when she wakes up, she can sing here to her heart's content!

The Titans were defeated, thanks to Bacchusmon's valiant efforts,
but unfortunatly, Sirenmon became a casualty of the fierce battle.

Believing Sirenmon would one day be resurrected, Bacchusmon
vowed to continue waiting.

Protected by those strong feelings, the forest of the Great
Tree became invigorated...

...and, together with the village Digimon, began marking
the passage of time once again.

Another comrade in the battle against fate... As your bonds
grow stronger, so too does the vessel for the Sacred Current.
Here we go again!
This is just like what happened before, too!
May the higher being watch over you, chosen ones.

For now, go back to your prior location. Your comrade
there awaits your return.

Hey, where'd you run off to? I was worried when you
disappeared so suddenly after the battle!
It's all ready for ya.
What's ready?

A party for our esteemed guests, of course. Let's go all
out and share the joy!
Ugh... I ate too much...

Just because Bacchusmon quit drinking, there's no excuse
for him to eat like a glutton!

I'm having fun. I hope we can keep bringing peace back...
just like this.
Aegiomon... your power made this all possible.
Say, Inori...
If I ever master this power of mine...
...do you think I could do it?
Huh? Do what?
Go back in time and save your mom and brother.
What...?
Of course, it might not pan out exactly perfectly, though...

I've been afraid Aegiomon would come up with an idea like
this eventually...
It's dangerous... Too dangerous.
If someone with godlike abilites acted on personal whims...

...the world as we know it would cease to exist. History
would become muddled and chaotic beyond repair...!

What the Titans said about Aegiomon wouldn't be far from the
truth. He would become a demon incarnate...
*sigh*
*Nod*
...Phew.
Inori... I'll always protect you...
Hehe. You're even trying to protect me in your dreams...
Phew...
Thank you, Aegiomon.
Eh hehe...
The sky looks so different here.

We've come someplace very far away... A different world and
a different time, too.
Huh? Am I still scared...?

I was a little nervous at first, but you kept talking to me by my
side {player}, and that helped me relax.

It's just... I always used to be afraid to be alone at night.
Whenever it got all dark and quiet, I would remember the past...
But now? Now, I'm fine.
Ngh...
Oh!
Oh, sorry! Did we wake you up?
Mmh... Ngh...

Hey, Aegiomon, do you remember when we talked about
constellations on the rooftop?
Hmm?

People would look up at the night sky, connect the stars to
make pictures, and call them heroes and gods.
Do you think those heroes and gods could've been Digimon?
Huh?
*giggle*

Someone like me, a human, could've stumbled into this world
and thought the Digimon were gods or something...
If that's the case... I think that'd be so wonderful.

When I was younger, I'd always pray to the stars when I was
alone at night—to forget about being scared or lonely.
Maybe my prayers went through.
I'm not lonely anymore.

I mean, if the gods really do exist, then maybe they
granted my prayers...
Yeah, maybe...

You know, I've been wondering... Why was I the only Digimon
to be born in the human world?
If it was to make your wishes come true... Then I'd be okay with that.

You might think that's totally crazy, but I can believe whatever
I want, right?
*sigh*

Inori, you were the one who found me in the underground
below Shinjuku... That wasn't a coincidence.

That's why I'll always keep protecting you and watching over
you. Like... the stars in the night sky...
Thank you for saying that.

I actually just came up with a new wish, right now, and I want
you two to hear it.
Mmh...
I wish for the three of us to always be together.
